weapons.name: Enchanted War Gauntlet of the Exalted Grull
weapons.lore: Charcoal bracer that transforms into a spiked gauntlet when a fist is held for 2 seconds.

weapons.name: Xistera Scoop
weapons.lore: Banana-shaped wicker basket for launching explosives with incredible accuracy.

weapons.name: Nekhebit's Crossbow
weapons.lore: Golden automatic crossbow. +25% damage per female in party.

weapons.name: Carl's Jug O' Boom
weapons.lore: Custom incendiary: jug + goblin oil + torch = thermobaric splash.

weapons.name: Spunky Jefferson
weapons.lore: Crusty blood-splattered tube sock filled with nickels. It talks.

weapons.name: Carl's Doomsday Scenario
weapons.lore: Overloaded soul crystal in a glass case. Detonates on removal from inventory.

weapons.name: Hobgoblin Hob-Lobber
weapons.lore: Dense round bombs slightly smaller than a baseball. Fused for stability.

weapons.name: Enchanted Fang Caps of the Expectorating Tizheruk
weapons.lore: Golden fang caps. +50% bite damage, chance to poison/paralyze.

weapons.name: Dirty Little Phased Bolt
weapons.lore: Invisible bolt. Drains target to 10% HP without awarding a kill skull.

weapons.name: Bolt of Ophiotaurus
weapons.lore: Pauses deity invulnerability for 15 seconds if shot into their eye.

weapons.name: Velma the Flamethrower
weapons.lore: Heavy flamethrower worn as backpack. Extra lethal vs vampires with Ultraviolet.

weapons.name: The Waffle Maker
weapons.lore: Thermos-sized thermobaric. Incinerates 100m radius.

weapons.name: No Disassemble
weapons.lore: Square EMP bomb. Disables shields and tech.

weapons.name: Magical Automatic Shotgun
weapons.lore: Modified Mossberg with infinite ammo. Might be sapient.

weapons.name: Ifechi's Leech Staff
weapons.lore: Summons leeches that drain enemies. Eat leeches for STR buff.

weapons.name: Meteor Hammer
weapons.lore: Flaming ball on chain. Bone-crushing force.

weapons.name: Shade Gnoll Riot Baton
weapons.lore: Telescoping baton 25cm to 3m. Auto-casts Knockback vs 10+ mobs.

weapons.name: Left Fang of the Green Sultan
weapons.lore: Glowing green venomous saber. Full power only when paired with Right Fang.

weapons.name: Enchanted Shuriken of Bloodlust
weapons.lore: Cheap-looking stars. +8% damage per hit on same mob type.

weapons.name: Wand of Nighty-Night
weapons.lore: Gnarled wand. L10 Sleep on non-boss for 5 min.

weapons.name: Toad Cudgel
weapons.lore: Big stick for bonking. Does minimal damage.

weapons.name: Poker
weapons.lore: Wrought-iron fireplace poker. Bends easily.

weapons.name: Massive War Lance
weapons.lore: Enormously long glowing spear. Immense reach when mounted.

weapons.name: Boomerang Bowler Hat
weapons.lore: Thrown to decapitate enemies, boomerangs back to user.

weapons.name: Venomous Elven Rock Chucker
weapons.lore: Mini trebuchet. Lobs 300lb rocks. Potion cup adds AoE elements.

weapons.name: Hobgoblin Disco Ball
weapons.lore: Rainbow smoke bomb. Invisibility potion soaked into smoke curtain. Unstable.

weapons.name: Shrink Wand
weapons.lore: 10 charges. Shrinks targets in battle.

weapons.name: Madness Satchel Bomb
weapons.lore: Power of 3 sticks of hobgoblin dynamite. Destabilizes rapidly outside inventory.

weapons.name: Mag 3040 Valtay Pulse Pistol
weapons.lore: Illegal alien tech. Using it = instant disqualification. Contraband.

armor.name: Cloak of the Benevolent Champion
armor.lore: Black/blue silky cloak. Flight, shields, slowly raises lowest stat.

armor.name: Anarchist's Battle Rattle
armor.lore: Sleeveless black canvas jacket. +1 all stats per patch.

armor.name: Scavenger's Daughter Patch
armor.lore: Back patch. Doubles all patch bonuses. Grants Soul Reaper.

armor.name: Nightgaunt Cloak of Stoutness
armor.lore: Black demon-wing cloak. Anti-piercing for all armor.

armor.name: Spiked Kneepads of the Shade Gnoll
Get Back Shield
armor.lore: 6ft riot shield. Upgrades Rush into Crowd Blast.

armor.name: Tiara of a Thousand Lights
armor.lore: Opalescent crown. Can drain and store buffs from 99 other hats.

armor.name: Prism Industries Goggles
armor.lore: Oversized sunglasses. Focuses eye-lasers into multi-beam.

armor.name: Crown of the Sepsis Whore
armor.lore: Unremovable jeweled tiara. 15% Sepsis on attacks. CURSED.

armor.name: Enchanted Mongoliensis Saddle
armor.lore: Blue/red tasseled saddle. +20% CON to mount, +15% spell damage to rider.

armor.name: Silver Butterfly Collar Charm
armor.lore: Silver butterfly on a ring. Jingles pleasantly.

armor.name: Ring of Water Breathing
armor.lore: Breathe underwater. Side effect: grow gills, -1 CHA.

armor.name: Quiet Slippers
armor.lore: Silent movement footwear. Useless for barefoot builds.

armor.name: Warrior's Gold Helmet of Resistance
armor.lore: Magical resistance. Only works while wielding a sword.

armor.name: Fuzzy Handcuffs
armor.lore: Requires 200 STR to break. Vocal safe word to unlock.

scrolls_tomes.name: Dungeon Anarchist's Cookbook
scrolls_tomes.lore: Disguised recipe book. Erases itself if you tell anyone about it.

scrolls_tomes.name: Scroll of Upgrade
scrolls_tomes.lore: 20 min shelf life. Upgrades one random equipped item.

scrolls_tomes.name: Tome of Wisp Armor
scrolls_tomes.lore: Teaches Wisp Armor spell (5 mana, -75% magic damage, anti-mind-control).

scrolls_tomes.name: Tome of Magic Missile
scrolls_tomes.lore: Teaches Magic Missile. Scales with mana invested.

scrolls_tomes.name: Tome of Minion Army
scrolls_tomes.lore: 50 mana, 5 min cast. Turns % of enemies against their allies.

scrolls_tomes.name: Scroll of Size Up
scrolls_tomes.lore: Reveals exact stats/weaknesses of targeted enemy. 30s delay.

scrolls_tomes.name: Filthy Crawler's Book of Voodoo
scrolls_tomes.lore: Magical diary for private messaging between crawlers who've met.

scrolls_tomes.name: Scroll of Community Pool
scrolls_tomes.lore: Transfers afflictions. Dangerous: can bounce back and forth.

scrolls_tomes.name: Tome of Torch
scrolls_tomes.lore: Creates light that follows caster. Gets stronger with use.

scrolls_tomes.name: Scroll of Hasten Poison
scrolls_tomes.lore: Rapidly accelerates poison effects in target.

scrolls_tomes.name: Tome of Hanzo
scrolls_tomes.lore: Aggro-manipulation: draws mobs closer to caster.

scrolls_tomes.name: Scroll of Cracker Jack
scrolls_tomes.lore: Unlocks restricted/benefactor items locked by system.

scrolls_tomes.name: Tome of War Crime
scrolls_tomes.lore: Atrocity-class spell. Classified as an act of fiendish cruelty.

scrolls_tomes.name: Tome of I Need My Personal Space
scrolls_tomes.lore: Knocks EVERYONE back violently. Including allies.

potions.name: Mordecai's Special Brew
potions.lore: Healing + Troll's Second Wind = 30s immortality. Only works twice ever.

potions.name: Good Mana Refill
potions.lore: Better mana potion. Restores over 2 minutes.

potions.name: Hell-Kissed Potion of Conscription
potions.lore: Forces unaffiliated entity to join your faction. Including gods.

potions.name: Dolores Doesn't Splat
potions.lore: Survive any lethal fall. Vaporizes landing surface.

potions.name: Celestial Skill Potion of the Prince of Woe
potions.lore: Black bubbling skull bottle. Grants random L10-15 combat skill.

potions.name: Pawna's Tears
potions.lore: Smoking ornate perfume bottle. +5 to any chosen spell or skill.

potions.name: Cosmic Buff Potion
potions.lore: Pink frothy. +10 to random base stat permanently. No limit.

potions.name: Superb Constitution Buff
potions.lore: Orange bubbly. +1 to +4 CON permanently. Only 2 per crawler.

potions.name: Potion of Bloodlust
potions.lore: Doubles STR, grants extra action. Berserker fury.

potions.name: Potion of Feather Fall
potions.lore: Negates falling damage. Drift gently to ground.

potions.name: Minor Find Crawler Skill Potion
potions.lore: Grants L5 Find Crawler skill. Tastes like strawberry juice.

potions.name: Fragmenting Potion Ball
potions.lore: Rubber ball holds a potion. Throw to splash effects on enemy.

materials.name: Toraline Root Vegetable
materials.lore: Grows in lava dirt. Used for Phase potions, magical ink, and spell theft.

materials.name: Rev-Up Moonshine Jug
materials.lore: 180-proof accelerant. Base for Jug O'Boom and immunity smoothies.

materials.name: Hobgoblin Pus
materials.lore: Moldable C4-like explosive. Needs detonator trigger.

materials.name: Nitro Sludge
materials.lore: Ramen-like blocks. Inert alone, massive explosion amplifier when heated.

materials.name: Soul Crystal
materials.lore: Glowing gem from Scolopendra. Power source. Overloaded = city-leveling bomb.

materials.name: Proximity Trigger
materials.lore: Dime-sized black box. Adds activation conditions to traps.

materials.name: Dwarven Battery
materials.lore: Brick-sized metal block. Powers vehicles and automatons.

materials.name: Thorn Sap Tips
materials.lore: Rare plant cuttings. Used for Charm Animal potions.

materials.name: Vile Dill
materials.lore: Herb required for Liquid Therapy madness-cure potions.

materials.name: Platinum Sharpening Stone
materials.lore: Instant permanent weapon upgrade. Short shelf life — use immediately.

tools.name: Pedicure Kit of the Sylph
tools.lore: 12 foot-care tools. +15% barefoot damage, unbreakable feet, trap delay.

tools.name: Goo-Inator 3000
tools.lore: Silver lollipop tool. Shapes metal like dough at a workbench.

tools.name: Sheol Glass Reaper Case
tools.lore: Protective case forged on floor 15. Safely houses dangerous items.

tools.name: Coffee Shop Author Kit
tools.lore: Paper + quill + ink. Written content syncs to mental interface.

tools.name: Valtay Neural Enhancer #544
tools.lore: Blue/yellow pill. Permanently adds HUD elements (portals, altimeter).

tools.name: Personal Space Upgrade Coupon
tools.lore: Voucher worth 250k gold for guildhall upgrades.

tools.name: Mercenary Coupon
tools.lore: 100k gold of mercenary services at Meat Shields.

tools.name: PVP Coupon
tools.lore: Assassinate named crawler for massive reward boxes.

tools.name: Loot Punch Card
tools.lore: 5 spots. Fill card by picking up Celestial items. Special prize when complete.

plushies.name: Stuffed Kimaris Figure
plushies.lore: Collectible bean bag. True summons demon Kimaris for entire floor.

plushies.name: Stuffed Grulke Infantry
plushies.lore: Brown frog in spiked helmet. 15-30 second summon.

plushies.name: Stuffed Eclipse Pyxie
plushies.lore: Fat guinea pig with bat wings. Becomes aggressive flying swarm.

plushies.name: Stuffed Slate Butterfly
plushies.lore: Grey moth toy. Becomes flying creature.

plushies.name: Stuffed Back Alley Mouser
plushies.lore: Cat plush. Needs Tame spell to use as decoy instead of attacker.

plushies.name: Veriluxx RealPet Donut
plushies.lore: Off-color robot cat. Spouts Garfield quotes. Explodes if broken.

vehicles.name: Party Planner Airship
vehicles.lore: Stealth tilt-rotor bomber. +50% bomb yield. Requires soul crystal.

vehicles.name: Royal Chariot
vehicles.lore: Rickety ATV with snowmobile track. Fast across sand. Splits for inventory.

vehicles.name: Mongo + Saddle
vehicles.lore: Royal steed. +20% CON mount, +15% spell damage rider.

vehicles.name: Simoom the Battle Rhino
vehicles.lore: Albino rhino L75. Ornate howdah with magic shield curtains.

vehicles.name: Gonk the Swamp Yak
vehicles.lore: Terrifying swamp yak. Heavy mount for lances and heavy weapons.

reward_boxes.name: Benefactor Box
reward_boxes.lore: From corporate sponsors. Often contains alien tech unavailable in dungeon.

reward_boxes.name: Fan Box
reward_boxes.lore: Contents voted on by audience. 30hr voting window. Higher tier = less trolling.

reward_boxes.name: Boss Box
reward_boxes.lore: Scales with boss tier. Neighborhood=Bronze, Floor Boss=Celestial.

reward_boxes.name: Quest Box
reward_boxes.lore: Can upgrade via achievements (Hadji, Bandit). Double-upgrade = Celestial.

reward_boxes.name: Adventurer Box
reward_boxes.lore: Most common. Basic potions, torches, biscuits, unenchanted gear.

reward_boxes.name: Pet Box
reward_boxes.lore: Pet biscuits, Heal Critter scrolls, pet store coupons.

reward_boxes.name: Spicy Box
reward_boxes.lore: AI's foot fetish. Toe rings, foot lotions, patches. Disturbing.

reward_boxes.name: Asshole's Box
reward_boxes.lore: Prank drops. Mace tubes, ex photos, useless items.

reward_boxes.name: Celestial Heavy Metal Box
reward_boxes.lore: Drum kit with pyrotechnics. Demon plays speed metal solo before it explodes.

reward_boxes.name: Legendary Lucky Bitch Box
reward_boxes.lore: For surviving impossible odds through sheer luck.

reward_boxes.name: Gold Gobble Box
reward_boxes.lore: Turkey-shaped. Contains deep fryer and Facebook recipes.

reward_boxes.name: Bronze Survivor Box
reward_boxes.lore: For having <10% HP when boss died. Contains heal scrolls.

food_drugs.name: Enhanced Pet Biscuit
food_drugs.lore: Grants animal intelligence + Crawler ID. 50% good, 50% neutral/bad.

food_drugs.name: Blitz Stick
food_drugs.lore: Licorice stick. +5 INT. Smoking: 15% chance +1 permanent INT. Addictive.

food_drugs.name: Mana Toast
food_drugs.lore: Burned triangle of toast. Refills mana. That's it. Fuck you.

food_drugs.name: Experience Cookie
food_drugs.lore: Chocolate chip cookie. +10 XP. One per crawler per day.

food_drugs.name: Pet Biscuit
food_drugs.lore: Dry treat. Feeds pet for a full day.

food_drugs.name: Glory Bound
food_drugs.lore: Coma-inducing drug. Relive a memory fully. Brain damage. Kills eventually.

food_drugs.name: Warka
food_drugs.lore: Dungeon beer. From the safe room soda machine.

food_drugs.name: Skyr and Jam
food_drugs.lore: Icelandic dish. Tastes like bad sour cream mixed with Jolly Ranchers.
